# pi-coding-agent

> Use when embedding `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent` as a coding-agent runtime in Node scripts, writing pi extensions (plugins) with `pi.registerTool` / `pi.registerCommand` / `pi.on`, packaging and `pi install` from npm/git, or picking between the SDK and `pi --mode rpc` for non-Node hosts. Covers session setup, the cwd Г— tools factory trap, TypeBox tool schemas, and the `peerDependencies` rule. Trigger on `pi-coding-agent`, `pi.registerTool`, `pi install`, or "embed a coding agent into Node" descriptions even when pi is not named.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/node/pi-coding-agent
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/node/pi-coding-agent
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
